Install and update your @ptdl plugins fr: Install and update your @ptdl plugins from one manifest — no browser upload. The weekly check only notifies; nothing is auto-applied.
A JSON listing { packageName, version, u: A JSON listing { packageName, version, url } per plugin. Default = the public @ptdl repo.
A manifest that lists each plugin + its: A manifest that lists each plugin + its download URL.
Press “Check now” to load the plugin lis: Press “Check now” to load the plugin list from the manifest.
Install adds a plugin (then Enable it). Update replaces an installed plugin. Each triggers an app reload, handled automatically.
The app is reloading — please wait…: The app is reloading — please wait…
